heading: Duties: warrant officers; limitations
label: 7218 Duties: warrant officers; limitations
text: Under regulations prescribed by the President, a warrant officer may be assigned to perform duties that necessarily include those normally performed by a commissioned officer.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)354810:593 (1st sentence).(1st sentence), .Aug. 21, 1941, ch. 384, § 455 Stat. 65310:593 (1st sentence, less provisos) is omitted as superseded by . 10:593 (last proviso) is omitted as covered by (article 136(a)(4) of the Uniform Code of Military Justice). The words “may be assigned” are substituted for the words “shall be vested with power to”.section 3012(e) of this titlesection 936(a)(4) of this title
